title: personal-review insights
description: The single data object the semantic pass produces. It is embedded verbatim into report-template.html as the #report-data JSON blob; the template's inline JS renders every section across 3 tabs (总览/洞察/行动). Deterministic bits (tool_scene, the header overview counts you may copy from stats.json) are never eyeballed. Every semantic claim should cite corpus indices via `refs`. NOTE: `rhythm` and `idea_to_action` were removed from the report by user request — do not produce them.

generated_note.description: one-line human summary of the period

attention_bill.description: Section 1 — % of attention by topic. Percentages should sum to ~100.

attention_migration.description: Section 2 — topic->topic attention flows across the period. Rendered as an inline-SVG Sankey. `nodes` are ordered left(earlier)->right(later); `flows` connect them with a weight.

narrative.description: short bullet phrases like '旅行规划 -> 明显降温'

recurring_questions.description: Section 3 — open questions asked repeatedly. Rendered as frequency bars.

decisions.description: Section 4 — decisions the user made during the period.

project_momentum.description: Section 5 — momentum per project. Rendered as state chips.

sops.description: Section 6 — repeatable procedures worth codifying (SOPs) surfaced from repeated workflows.

recommendations.description: Section 7 — this-week guidance in three buckets.

emotion_energy.description: Section 8 — emotion/energy signals inferred from wording (frustration, excitement, hesitation). Not clinical; reflective.

overall.description: one-line read of the period's tone

open_loops.description: 未闭环问题追踪 (洞察 tab) — open questions/ideas the user RAISED but never followed up on or reached a conclusion about, so good thinking isn't forgotten. Distinct from recurring_questions (asked repeatedly) — an open loop may be asked only once but left dangling. Rank by how much it matters. `status` marks how stuck it is.

item.description: the dangling question/idea, phrased so future-you knows what to pick up

raised.description: optional: when/where it came up, e.g. '7/20 量化讨论中'

status.description: open=未动; blocked=被卡; waiting_on_me=等我拍板; needs_research=需先调研

tool_scene.description: Optional Section 11 — DETERMINISTIC. Only include when stats.tool_scene.available is true. Copy apps/web_domains from stats.json. Omit the whole object when unavailable so the template hides the section.
